description: SSOT character sheets. B2.5 off-body design plates (costume flat/callout, prop hero/3view) then on-model. Turns=qwen. Wardrobe/props from bible.

global.quality_tags: cinematic still photo, natural human skin with visible micro-texture pores freckles and subtle skin grain, soft healthy glow not plastic, subsurface skin scatter, realistic face skin detail, film still, sharp focus, natural color grading, clean photoreal surface without CGI polish, no graphic overlays
global.product_quality_tags: product photography, catalog still, sharp focus, even softbox lighting, accurate color, clean surface detail, high resolution fabric and material texture, no text labels
global.global_negative: identity shift, different person, face morph, extra fingers, deformed hands, mutated face, bad anatomy, blurry face, watermark, text, logo, duplicate face, mannequin, doll, plastic skin, porcelain skin, waxy skin, airbrushed skin, overly smooth skin, CGI skin, doll-like face, beauty filter, heavy softbox plastic gloss, stick figure, openpose skeleton, colored joint dots, neon skeleton overlay, controlnet lines on body, drawn guide lines, geometric body guide, wireframe body
global.product_negative: person, human, face, hands, body, model wearing clothes, fashion model, portrait, selfie, mannequin head, mannequin face, mannequin limbs, ghost figure, watermark, text, logo, busy background, clutter

master.front_upper.instruction: medium close-up portrait, front-facing, neutral soft expression, looking at camera
master.front_upper.style_lock: plain light gray seamless background, even softbox studio lighting, no harsh shadows, no scene props
master.front_upper.negative_extra: profile view, extreme smile, action pose, busy background, dark moody lighting
master.front_upper.notes: Used by character_create for hero selection

master.full_body.instruction: full body standing character sheet photo, entire body head-to-toe in frame, feet visible, front view, arms relaxed slightly away from torso, neutral expression, orthographic model-sheet pose, not a close-up, not cropped, fully clothed
master.full_body.style_lock: plain light gray seamless background, even studio lighting, full-length fashion model sheet, ample headroom and foot room, casual street clothes
master.full_body.negative_extra: nude, naked, nsfw, bare breasts, close-up, portrait crop, headshot, cropped feet, cropped head, sitting, action pose, busy background, extreme close-up face
master.full_body.notes: Required source for ControlNet turnaround; use strong full-body wording

head.front.instruction: head and shoulders portrait, plain light gray studio background, technical character head turnaround, keep same face identity and hairstyle

head.qf.instruction: head and shoulders portrait, plain light gray studio background, technical character head turnaround, keep same face identity and hairstyle
head.qf.notes: Default: Qwen multi-angles. OpenPose fallback: controlnet_empty + head_qf.

head.side.instruction: head and shoulders portrait, plain light gray studio background, technical character head turnaround, keep same face identity and hairstyle
head.side.notes: Default: Qwen multi-angles. OpenPose fallback: controlnet_empty + head_side.

head.back.instruction: head and shoulders portrait, plain light gray studio background, technical character head turnaround, keep same face identity and hairstyle
head.back.notes: Default: Qwen multi-angles. OpenPose fallback: controlnet_empty + head_back.

turnaround.front.instruction: full body standing, head-to-toe visible, fully clothed, neutral A-pose arms slightly away, plain light gray studio background, orthographic character model sheet, no nude
turnaround.front.notes: Default: Qwen multi-angles. OpenPose fallback: --engine controlnet.

turnaround.qf.instruction: full body standing, head-to-toe visible, fully clothed, neutral A-pose arms slightly away, plain light gray studio background, orthographic character model sheet, no nude

turnaround.side.instruction: full body standing, head-to-toe visible, fully clothed, neutral A-pose arms slightly away, plain light gray studio background, orthographic character model sheet, no nude

turnaround.back.instruction: full body standing, head-to-toe visible, fully clothed, neutral A-pose arms slightly away, plain light gray studio background, orthographic character model sheet, no nude

costume.flat_front.instruction: costume design flat lay FRONT, empty garments only no person, default wardrobe from bible laid flat on seamless surface, top and bottom arranged clearly, shoes beside, product catalog photo

costume.callout.instruction: costume construction CALLOUT sheet, multiple close-up fabric detail panels of default wardrobe from bible: collar, sleeve cuff, button placket, fabric weave, footwear sole, accessory metal, product design reference grid, no person
